name: Lumina Gold Corp.
description: Lumina Gold Corp. is a Canada-based precious and base metals exploration and development company headquartered in Vancouver. The company is primarily focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resources in Ecuador, with its flagship asset being the wholly owned Cangrejos gold-copper project located in the El Oro Province. As a resource development firm, Lumina Gold aims to advance this significant project through the exploration and development stages to unlock value from its mineral deposits in the Andean region.
